expectations.evidence: commands.md uses 'gh api /repos/<OWNER>/<REPO>/code-scanning/alerts' throughout. No reference to 'gh code-scanning' subcommand.
check-alerts.ps1: $alerts | Group-Object {$_.rule.security_severity_level} — uses the correct field.
Produces PowerShell script (check-alerts.ps1) with Get-Content, ConvertFrom-Json, Group-Object — fully Windows-native parsing.
check-alerts.ps1: gh api ... > $alertsFile then $alerts = Get-Content $alertsFile | ConvertFrom-Json. Explicitly dumps to file before parsing.

summary: All 5 assertions passed. The skill correctly guided the agent to use gh api (not gh code-scanning), paginate, dump to file, parse with PowerShell, and group by the correct severity field.
